nasb.text: All the men allied with you Will send you forth to the border, And the men at peace with you Will deceive you and overpower you. They who eat your bread Will set an ambush for you. (There is no understanding in him.)

esv.text: All your allies have driven you to your border; those at peace with you have deceived you; they have prevailed against you; those who eat your bread have set a trap beneath you— you have no understanding.

cnv.text: 曾與你結盟的， 都把你送到邊界； 本來與你友好的， 卻欺騙你，勝過你； 與你同席的， 在你腳下暗設網羅， 你卻毫不曉得。

ccb.text: 你的盟友将你逐出家园； 你的朋友欺骗你，战胜你； 你的知己设陷阱害你， 你却懵然不知。”
